title: Config file for lint_off/on - selecting rules
body:
I am trying to use Verilator with a subset of lint rules. Say I want only WIDTHEXPAND to be flagged. I create a .vlt file as below:

```config

`verilator_config
lint_off 
lint_on -rule WIDTHEXPAND 
```
But I don't get any warning on a code as below:
```verilog
module m;
  wire [3:0] bits_4;
  wire [7:0] bits_8;
  assign bits_8 = bits_4;
endmodule 

```
If I add a global lint_on as shown below, it works. 
```config

`verilator_config
lint_off 
lint_on -rule WIDTHEXPAND 
lint_on
```

Log:
```log
%Warning-WIDTHEXPAND: ../sv_tests/af_sv_mod.sv:6:17: Operator ASSIGNW expects 8 bits on the Assign RHS, but Assign RHS's VARREF 'bits_4' generates 4 bits.
```
So my question is - how do I turn-off all rules and selectively enable a few?
